questions.text: After watching these ads, which telecom brand are you most likely to consider switching to or subscribing with?
options: None / I will stay with my current provider
questions.rationale: Measures actual purchase intent impact of the ads, which is missing from likeability and recall questions.

questions.text: In your own words, what makes a telecom ad memorable or convincing to you?
questions.rationale: Captures open-ended consumer insight on ad effectiveness drivers to guide future creative direction.
